details.test: Task 1: Submit Sales Inquiry Lead with $8,000 budget and 1-3 months timeline
Task 2: Request Product Demo for 51-200 company next Wednesday 10am-12pm
Task 3: Newsletter signup weekly with Product Updates and Case Studies
Task 4: Request custom quote for cheapest plan under $250/month
Task 5: Download gated resource (benchmark/trends) with SaaS industry lead
Task 6: Submit partnership inquiry as reseller with $100k–$250k revenue
Task 7: Submit urgent billing support request as existing customer
Task 8: Create pre-sales lead via chat widget
Task 9: Request a quote within 30 days for 40 users via contact page
